title: dissanthelium calycinum
intro: Dissanthelium calycinum, also known as Calico Rose Muhly or Calico Muhly, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Dissanthelium calycinum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its potential benefits.
